creator: devosalain@ymail.com
text:
The only thing i see in error log is :
[06:39:21] ninja: build stopped: subcommand failed.
[06:39:21] ===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
[06:39:21] Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
[06:39:21] the maintainer.
[06:39:21] *** Error code 1
[06:39:21] 
[06:39:21] Stop.
[06:39:21] make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/chromium

Which is not very instructive ...
